case_title: KUCERAVA, BERTA vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-19-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE 3RD ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 6/19/96: FOR DISMISSAL. $100.00 STAYED PENDING COMPLIANCE. HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUCERAVA, BERTA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-19-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-19-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-28-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-19-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-19-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR APR-18-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-18-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-18-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE-MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM APR-18-1996 TO MAY-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-20-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: $100.00 SANCTIONS STILL DUE AND PAYABLE. CASE WILL BE DISMISSED IF NO APPEARANCE AND/OR GOOD CAUSE. HEARING SET FOR JUN-19-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-19-1996, DISMISSAL PLAINTIFF WAS SERVED NOTICE THROUGH AGENT, MR COHN.
